url_already_exists.message: The URL "{url}" is already in use. Please choose a different one.

yaml_mode_deprecated.description:
Your YAML dashboard configuration uses the legacy `mode: yaml` option, which will be removed in Home Assistant 2026.8. Your YAML dashboards will continue to work, you just need to update how they are defined.

To update your configuration:

1. Remove `mode: yaml` from `lovelace:` in your `configuration.yaml`
2. Add a dashboard entry instead:

   ```yaml
   lovelace:
     dashboards:
       lovelace:
         mode: yaml
         filename: {config_file}
         title: Overview
         icon: mdi:view-dashboard
         show_in_sidebar: true
   ```

3. If you have `resources:` in your lovelace configuration, add `resource_mode: yaml` to keep loading them from YAML
4. Restart Home Assistant
yaml_mode_deprecated.title: Lovelace YAML configuration needs update

reload_resources.description: Reloads dashboard resources from the YAML-configuration.
reload_resources.name: Reload resources
